meta.subtitle: Cherry Blossom Adventure · Mani & Anandi
meta.manifestDescription: Tokyo · Hakone · Fuji · Nagoya · Kyoto · Hiroshima · Osaka — cherry blossom itinerary, trains & hotels.

dayCards.day-1:
1DAY
Friday · Mar 27
Arrive Tokyo 🗼
📍 Tokyo — Hilton Shinjuku
›
4:00 PM
Land at Narita (NRT)
Depart SFO Mar 26 at 12:40 PM · Arrival in Tokyo ~4 PM
After customs
Limousine Bus → Hilton Tokyo
Airport Limousine Bus counter — buy ticket for Hilton Tokyo (Shinjuku area).
~6:00 PM
Check in — Hilton Tokyo, Shinjuku
4-night stay (Mar 27–31)
Evening
Omoide Yokocho (Memory Lane)
Smoky yakitori alley, 5-min walk from Hilton
✈️
Arrival in Tokyo at 4PM. After customs → go to Limousine Bus counter and buy a ticket for Hilton Tokyo. Hilton Tokyo 6pm. Shinjuku area.
⚡
TODAY'S MUST-DO:
✓ Welcome Suica on both iPhones (Apple Wallet)
✓ Link both Suica IDs to Smart EX App
✓ Associate all Smart EX train reservations
🎫
Buy Fuji-Hakone Pass today or tomorrow (Mar 27–28) at Odakyu Sightseeing Center, Shinjuku West Exit, Ground Floor. ¥11,700/person.
dayCards.day-2:
2DAY
Saturday · Mar 28
Shinjuku · Harajuku · Shibuya 🌸
📍 Tokyo
›
9:00 AM
Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
Best cherry blossom garden in Tokyo. Go early!
🌸 Cherry
~11:30 AM
Meiji Shrine + Yoyogi Park
Serene forested shrine, then cherry blossoms in Yoyogi
~2:00 PM
Harajuku — Takeshita Street
Street fashion, crepes, Japanese pop culture
~5:00 PM
Shibuya Crossing
World's busiest crossing — best viewed at dusk
🎫
Buy Fuji-Hakone Pass if not done yesterday. Odakyu Sightseeing Center, Shinjuku West Exit, 1F near Odakyu West Exit Gate. ¥11,700 each.
🗺️
→ Google Maps route for today
dayCards.day-3:
3DAY
Sunday · Mar 29
Kamakura Day Trip 🗿
📍 Kamakura
›
8:30 AM
Leave Shinjuku Station
Shōnan–Shinjuku Line toward Zushi / Yokosuka
9:45 AM
Arrive Kamakura → Enoden → Hase
10:30–12:00
Hasedera Temple + Great Buddha (Kotoku-in)
13m bronze Amida Buddha — walk inside!
12:30–2:30
Lunch + Tsurugaoka Hachimangu
Grand Shinto shrine lined with cherry trees
3:00–4:00
Optional stroll / Komachi Street shopping
4:30 PM
Return train to Tokyo (~52 min)
dayCards.day-4:
4DAY
Monday · Mar 30
Ueno · Asakusa · Skytree 🏮
📍 Tokyo
›
Morning
Ueno Park
Tokyo's most famous cherry blossom park — 1,000+ trees
🌸 Cherry
Afternoon
Sensō-ji Temple, Asakusa
Oldest Tokyo temple. Kaminarimon Gate, Nakamise Street
~3:00 PM
Sumida River Walk
Cherry-lined riverside, Tokyo Skytree views
🌸 Cherry
~5:00 PM
Akihabara OR Tokyo Skytree — pick one
🧳 SHIP LUGGAGE THIS MORNING — CRITICAL
Before leaving hotel: drop at Hilton Tokyo bell desk. Destination: Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto. Check-in date: April 2. Cost: ~¥2,500–3,500/bag. Arrives Apr 2.
🗺️
→ Google Maps: Asakusa area
dayCards.day-5:
5DAY
Tuesday · Mar 31
Hakone Loop + Chureito Pagoda 🏔️
📍 Hakone → Kawaguchiko
›
EMOT App · Login: emot-tickets.jp
Shinjuku → Odawara
Train
Hakone 41
Departs
07:37
Arrives
09:22
🪑 Car 5 · Seat 8-C/D
9:22 AM
Arrive Hakone-Yumoto
Store roller suitcases in Ground Floor lockers (or staffed counter if full)
9:45 AM
Bus Line H (Platform 2) → Motohakone-ko
35 min. Covered by Fuji-Hakone Pass.
10:30 AM
Hakone Shrine Torii Gate
Floating red gate on Lake Ashi with Mt. Fuji backdrop
11:15 AM
Pirate Ship Cruise → Togendai (30 min)
Stay until Togendai (end). Best Fuji views from deck.
12:15 PM
Odakyu Highway Bus → Gotemba (45 min)
1:30 PM
Fujikyu Bus → Kawaguchiko (75 min)
2:45 PM
Arrive Kawaguchiko Station
~3:00 PM
🚕 Taxi → Check in Hotel Asafuji
Taxi from Kawaguchiko Station (~5–7 min). Check in before 6 PM cutoff. Drop bags. Ask front desk NOW to book 5:15 AM sunrise taxi!
~3:30 PM
Fujikyu Railway → Shimoyoshida Stn (13 min)
Walk or taxi from hotel to Kawaguchiko Station (~5 min), then board train
3:45–5:30
⛩️ Chureito Pagoda — Golden Hour!
398 steps up. Perfect golden hour Fuji + Pagoda + Cherry Blossom photos! Take your time.
⭐ Unmissable
~5:45 PM
Train back to Kawaguchiko Station
7:00 PM
Dinner — Taj Fuji Restaurant
4.8★ Indian vegetarian. Paneer Butter Masala, Dal Makhani, Veggie Biryani.
~8:30 PM
Return to Hotel Asafuji + Onsen
Enjoy the onsen soak — most close by 22:00–23:00.
🚕
Book the 5:15 AM sunrise taxi at check-in (~3 PM). Ask Hotel Asafuji front desk immediately on arrival. ~¥2,500 to Oishi Park (~10 min).
🏨
Hotel Asafuji
Check-in: Mar 31 (~3 PM) · Check-out: Apr 1
KAWAGUCHIKO · AMEX BOOKING
dayCards.day-6:
6DAY
Wednesday · Apr 1
Fuji Sunrise + Volcanic Loop + Odawara 🌅
📍 Fuji → Odawara → Nagoya
›
5:15 AM
🌅 Sunrise at Oishi Park
Pre-booked taxi ~10 min. Sunrise 5:32 AM. "Mirror Fuji" reflection across Lake Kawaguchi — before crowds!
⭐ Unmissable
7:30 AM
Breakfast at hotel + Check out
8:10 AM
Bus from hotel/lake → Kawaguchiko Station
8:30 AM
Fujikyu Bus → Gotemba Station
10:00 AM
Odakyu Highway Bus → Togendai
10:45–1:30
Volcanic Loop — Ropeway & Owakudani
Ropeway Togendai→Owakudani (sulfur vents, black Kuro-tamago eggs!) → Sounzan → Cable Car → Gora
1:45 PM
Quick soba/snack at Gora + board Tozan Railway immediately
Switchback train winds back down the mountain (40 min)
2:45 PM
Arrive Hakone-Yumoto · Retrieve suitcases
3:15 PM
Local train → Odawara Station (20 min)
3:35–6:00
🏯 Bonus: Odawara Castle or Minaka Odawara
Castle grounds 10-min walk from station (free). OR Minaka Odawara complex has a free rooftop footbath!
SmartEX · Apr 1 · Reservn #2003
Odawara → Nagoya
Train
Hikari 653
Departs
18:07
Arrives
19:14
🪑 Car 9 · Seat 9-C/D
🌡️
5°C colder near Fuji than Tokyo — bring layers! Carry snacks/protein bars for the transit day.
🏨
Marriott Nagoya
Check-in: Apr 1 · Check-out: Apr 2
NAGOYA · CHASE BOOKING

Morning
🎬 Ghibli Park (1-Day Bus Tour)
Subway Higashiyama Line → Fujigaoka, then Linimo (Maglev) → Ai-Chikyuhaku-Kinen-Koen Stn. Viator-booked.
🎫 Pre-booked
~5:00 PM
Return to Nagoya Station
7:03 PM
Board Hikari 721 → Kyoto
7:37 PM
Arrive Kyoto · Check in Hilton Garden Inn
Luggage already here from Tokyo shipment!
📋 Viator Conf: 1748454029 · Ref: 1365566583

Train
Hikari 721
Departs
19:03
Arrives

Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto

dayCards.day-8:
8DAY
Friday · Apr 3
Philosopher's Path + Maruyama 🍃
📍 Kyoto
›
Morning
Philosopher's Path (Tetsugaku-no-Michi)
1.8km canal-side walk lined with cherry trees. Start from Ginkaku-ji end, walk south.
🌸 Peak Blossom
Midday
Heian Shrine + Garden
Strolling garden with cherry blossoms over the pond
Afternoon
Maruyama Park
Iconic weeping Shidarezakura cherry. Paper lanterns at dusk — magical!
🌸 Night Blossom
Evening
Gion District Night Walk
Hanamikoji Street — chance to spot geiko/maiko after dark
🗺️
→ Google Maps: Kyoto Route
🍱
Try Shojin Ryori for lunch — Zen Buddhist vegetarian kaiseki. Reserve in advance near Philosopher's Path temples.
dayCards.day-9:
9DAY
Saturday · Apr 4
Kimono · Fushimi Inari · Arashiyama 👘
📍 Kyoto
›
8:00 AM
👘 Kimono Rental — Gion (Higashiyama)
Rental Kimono Okamoto Gion · 523 Washiocho, Higashiyama Ward · +81 75-531-7890. Go EARLY for empty streets!
⭐ Must Do
~9:00 AM
Photo walk: Yasaka Shrine → return kimono
Yasaka Shrine → Hanamikoji → Ninenzaka/Sannenzaka streets → Kiyomizu-dera. All walkable!
Midday
Fushimi Inari
JR Nara Line from Kyoto Station → Inari Station (5 min). Thousands of orange torii gates.
Afternoon
Arashiyama Bamboo Grove + Tenryu-ji Temple
Cherry blossoms over the temple pond. 45–60 min transit from Fushimi Inari.
Evening
Gion District
🧳 SHIP LUGGAGE TODAY (Apr 4, morning)
Drop at Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto bell desk. To: Hilton Osaka · Check-in: Apr 6 · Cost ~¥2,000–3,000/bag
📸
Add hair styling at the kimono shop. Some Gion alleys have photography restrictions — respect local signs. This is a full day — pace yourself!
dayCards.day-10:
10DAY
Sunday · Apr 5
Hiroshima + Miyajima ☮️⛩️
📍 Kyoto → Hiroshima → Miyajima
›
⏰
Early start! Nozomi 99 departs Kyoto at 08:03. Be at Kyoto Station by 07:45. Quick breakfast or grab from convenience store.
SmartEX · Apr 5 · Reservn #2007
Kyoto → Hiroshima
Train
Nozomi 99
Departs
08:03
Arrives
09:39
🪑 Car 8 · Seat 8-C/D
9:39 AM
Arrive Hiroshima Station
Buy Hiroshima Tourist Pass at Tourist Info (1F, Shinkansen North Exit). Opens 09:30 ✅
~10:00 AM
Check in Hilton Hiroshima
10:30 AM
Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park + Museum
Allow 2+ hours. One of Japan's most important sites. Children's Peace Monument, Atomic Bomb Dome nearby.
~1:00 PM
Lunch — Okonomimura (Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki)
Hiroshima Station area or Nishi-Hiroshima. Must-eat local specialty!
~2:30 PM
JR Sanyo Line → Miyajimaguchi (~25 min)
~3:10 PM
Ferry → Miyajima Island (10 min)
Sacred deer roam freely! Covered by Hiroshima Tourist Pass.
~3:20 PM
Itsukushima Shrine + Floating Torii Gate
Check tide times — gate "floats" at high tide. Cherry blossoms around shrine!
🌸 Cherry
~5:30 PM
Return ferry + train to Hiroshima
Evening
Dinner + rest at Hilton Hiroshima
🌊
Check the tide table for Miyajima on Apr 5 before you go. High tide = iconic "floating" gate. Low tide = you can walk to the gate but it looks very different.
🎫
Hiroshima Tourist Pass (¥1,000) at Station Tourist Info, 1F Shinkansen North Exit. Hours 09:30–17:30. Opens just after your arrival!
🏨
Hilton Hiroshima
Check-in: Apr 5 · Check-out: Apr 6
HIROSHIMA · HILTON BOOKING
dayCards.day-11:
11DAY
Monday · Apr 6
Full Day Osaka 🏯🌆
📍 Hiroshima → Osaka
›
SmartEX · Apr 6 · Reservn #2008
Hiroshima → Shin-Osaka
Train
Nozomi 10
Departs
09:07
Arrives
10:28
🪑 Car 8 · Seat 11-A/B
10:28 AM
Arrive Shin-Osaka → local JR → Osaka Station
Luggage already at Hilton Osaka from Kyoto shipment! ✅
~11:00 AM
Check in Hilton Osaka (Umeda)
~11:30 AM
Osaka Castle + Nishinomaru Garden
Thousands of cherry trees in the castle grounds. Nishinomaru Garden is the best cherry blossom spot inside.
🌸 Cherry
~2:00 PM
Kuromon Ichiba Market
Osaka's kitchen. Fresh tofu, veggie skewers, street food.
~3:30 PM
Shinsaibashi Shopping
Covered arcade — fashion, souvenirs, Japanese cosmetics
~6:00 PM
Dotonbori
Neon signs, street food, Glico Man sign, Osaka vibe!
~7:30 PM
Dinner — Pivot BASE Café & Bar or GYOZAOH! Dotonbori
🌟
Best day of the trip for food! Osaka is Japan's food capital. Try takoyaki, okonomiyaki, and kushikatsu from street stalls around Dotonbori.
🏨
Hilton Osaka
Check-in: Apr 6 · Check-out: Apr 7
OSAKA (UMEDA) · HILTON BOOKING
🗺️
→ Google Maps: Osaka day route
dayCards.day-12:
12DAY
Tuesday · Apr 7
Departure Day ✈️
📍 Osaka → SFO
›
9:00 AM
Leave hotel for airport
Allow time to reach Osaka Itami airport
12:40 PM
✈️ Depart Osaka → Tokyo Haneda
Arrives 1:55 PM
4:20 PM
✈️ Depart Tokyo Haneda → SFO
Arrives SFO 9:45 AM (same day — you gain time!)
⏰
Only 2h25 min between Haneda landing (1:55 PM) and SFO departure (4:20 PM). Go directly — no shopping. Tokyo Monorail to international terminal takes 40–50 min.

09:07

🎫

Transit Passes

📱
Welcome Suica (Both iPhones)
Mar 27 arrival. Apple Wallet. Both Mani & Anandi. Link to Smart EX immediately.
DAY 1
🏔️
Fuji-Hakone Pass
¥11,700/person. Odakyu Center, Shinjuku West Exit, 1F. Buy Mar 27 or 28. Or Klook eVoucher → exchange at Shinjuku. Covers buses, ropeway, pirate ship, Fujikyu Railway.
MAR 27–28
⛩️
Visit Hiroshima Tourist Pass
¥1,000. Tourist Info 1F Shinkansen North Exit. Hours 09:30–17:30. Buy immediately on arrival (opens just after your 09:39 train). Covers all trams + Miyajima Ferry.
APR 5 AM
🟦
Kyoto / Osaka — No pass needed
Use Suica (IC Card) pay-as-you-go. Maximum flexibility.
IC CARD

verbatimJapan.luggageTabInner:
🧳

Luggage Forwarding

Use TA-Q-BIN (Yamato Transport) — "Black Cat" logo. Drop at hotel bell desk. Travel hands-free!
📦 Shipment 1 — Drop on Mar 30 (morning)
From: Hilton Tokyo · To: Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto
Check-in date to write: April 2 · Arrives: Apr 2
Cost: ~¥2,500–3,500/bag
Why: Hands-free through Hakone, Fuji, Nagoya transit
📦 Shipment 2 — Drop on Apr 4 (morning)
From: Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto · To: Hilton Osaka
Check-in date to write: April 6 · Arrives: Apr 6
Cost: ~¥2,000–3,000/bag
Why: Hands-free for Hiroshima + Miyajima ferry
📋
How to ship
Hotel bell desk/concierge. Give next hotel name + check-in date. Staff fills waybill. Pay at desk or charge to room.
🎒
Overnight bag (Mar 31 → Apr 2)
Pack light: 2 shirts, socks, underwear, sleepwear, minimal toiletries, medications. Keep under 7–8 lbs.
⚖️
Shinkansen luggage rule
Bags over 160cm total dimensions need reserved "Oversized Baggage Area" at back of car. Mandatory on Tokaido/Sanyo Shinkansen.
verbatimJapan.foodTabInner:
🍛

Vegetarian Restaurants

Indian vegetarian + Shojin Ryori. Use HappyCow or Vegewel apps on the go.
🗼 Tokyo
⭐
Veg Kitchen Natraj
100% vegetarian, Jain options · Central Tokyo
⭐
Veg Herb Saga
Highly recommended dedicated vegetarian · Near Ueno
🌶️
Andhra Dining
South Indian, extensive vegetarian · Ginza area
🌶️
Dhaba India
South Indian, excellent vegetarian
🍕
The Seirinkan (Italian Pizza)
Highly rated · 155m from Naka-Meguro Station · theseirinkan.com
🏔️ Kawaguchiko (Fuji)
🥇
Taj Fuji ⭐ TOP PICK
4.8–4.9★. Paneer Butter Masala, Dal Makhani, Veggie Biryani. Best vegetarian near Hotel Asafuji.
🍲
Houtou Fudou
Local Houtou noodles (ask for vegetarian) · Near Kawaguchiko Station
🎋 Kyoto
⭐
Shojin Ryori (Temple Cuisine)
Zen Buddhist vegetarian kaiseki. Reserve in advance. Near Philosopher's Path temples.
🍛
Shama Vegetarian Indian Restaurant
Fully vegetarian, multiple curry sets · Kyoto city center
⛩️ Hiroshima
🥘
Okonomimura
Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki — ask for vegetarian version. Multi-floor building of stalls. Must try!
🌶️
Indian Vegetarian restaurants
Several near Peace Park. Search HappyCow on arrival.
🌆 Osaka
⭐
Indian Restaurant Shama Osaka
Pure vegetarian, extensive vegan options · near Dotonbori
🍽️
Pivot BASE Café & Bar / GYOZAOH! Dotonbori
Listed in your itinerary for Apr 6 dinner
💬
Say: "Watashi wa bejitarian desu" — "I am vegetarian." Stricter: "Tamago mo niku mo sakana mo tabemasen" (no egg, meat, or fish).

modals.m1:
Day 1 — Arrive Tokyo
Mar 26
Depart SFO 12:40 PM
Mar 27 4PM
Land Narita (NRT)
Immigration + Customs. Arrival in Tokyo ~4 PM. Set up Welcome Suica in Apple Wallet at airport.
After customs
Limousine Bus → Hilton Tokyo
Limousine Bus counter — buy ticket for Hilton Tokyo. Shinjuku area.
~6:00 PM
Check in Hilton Tokyo, Shinjuku
4 nights (Mar 27–31). Hilton Booking.
Evening
Omoide Yokocho (Memory Lane)
Smoky yakitori alley behind Shinjuku West Exit. 5-min walk from Hilton.
✈️
Arrival in Tokyo at 4PM. After customs → go to Limousine Bus counter and buy a ticket for Hilton Tokyo. Hilton Tokyo 6pm. Shinjuku area.
⚡
TODAY'S CHECKLIST:
✓ Welcome Suica on both iPhones
✓ Link Suica IDs to Smart EX App
✓ Associate all Smart EX reservations with Suica
✓ Consider buying Fuji-Hakone Pass if energy allows
modals.m2:
Day 2 — Tokyo Cherry Blossoms
9:00 AM
Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
Multiple cherry varieties, 1,000+ trees. Entrance ¥500. Go early before weekend crowds.
~11:30
Meiji Shrine + Yoyogi Park
70-hectare forested shrine. Yoyogi Park cherry blossoms + picnic atmosphere.
~2:00 PM
Harajuku — Takeshita Street
Colorful street fashion, crepes, candy floss, pop culture.
~5:00 PM
Shibuya Crossing
Best from Starbucks 2F above the crossing or Shibuya Sky observation deck.
🎫
Buy Fuji-Hakone Pass if not done: Odakyu Sightseeing Service Center, Shinjuku West Exit, 1F near Odakyu West Exit Gate. ¥11,700/person.
modals.m3:
Day 3 — Kamakura Day Trip
8:30 AM
Shinjuku → Kamakura
Shōnan–Shinjuku Line. Must go toward Zushi/Yokosuka direction. ~75 min.
9:45 AM
Enoden → Hase Station (2 stops)
10:30 AM
Hasedera Temple
Hilltop temple, ocean views, 11-headed Kannon goddess statue.
~11:30
Kotoku-in (Great Buddha)
13.35m bronze Amida Buddha. Walk inside the hollow statue!
12:30–2:30
Lunch + Tsurugaoka Hachimangu
Grand Shinto shrine at end of cherry-tree-lined avenue.
3:00–4:00
Komachi Street shopping
1km pedestrian street: crafts, snacks, souvenirs
4:30 PM
Return to Tokyo (~52 min)
modals.m4:
Day 4 — Ueno & Asakusa
FIRST
🧳 Ship luggage BEFORE leaving hotel
Drop at Hilton Tokyo bell desk. To: Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto. Check-in: April 2. Cost ~¥2,500–3,500/bag.
Morning
Ueno Park
Tokyo's most famous cherry spot. 1,000+ trees. Also: Ueno Zoo inside if interested.
Afternoon
Sensō-ji Temple, Asakusa
Oldest Tokyo temple. Kaminarimon Gate. Nakamise Street for souvenirs.
~3:00 PM
Sumida River Cherry Walk
Riverside promenade with Skytree views in background.
~5:00 PM
Akihabara OR Tokyo Skytree — pick one
Don't try both — pick based on energy.
modals.m5:
Day 5 — Hakone Grand Circuit
7:37 AM
Hakone 41 Romancecar from Shinjuku
EMOT App. Car 5, Seat 8-C/D. Observation car — look right for Fuji views!
9:22 AM
Arrive Hakone-Yumoto · Store suitcases
Ground Floor lockers. If full: staffed counter right next to them.
9:45 AM
Bus Line H (Platform 2) → Motohakone-ko (35 min)
10:30 AM
Hakone Shrine Torii Gate
Floating red gate on Lake Ashi with Mt. Fuji backdrop. Allow 30–45 min.
11:15 AM
Pirate Ship Cruise → Togendai (30 min)
Stay until Togendai (end of line). Best deck Fuji views.
12:15 PM
Odakyu Highway Bus → Gotemba (45 min)
1:30 PM
Fujikyu Bus → Kawaguchiko (75 min)
2:45 PM
Arrive Kawaguchiko Station
~3:00 PM
🚕 Taxi → Check in Hotel Asafuji
~5–7 min taxi from Kawaguchiko Station. Check in before 6 PM cutoff. Drop bags. Book 5:15 AM sunrise taxi immediately at front desk!
~3:30 PM
Fujikyu Railway → Shimoyoshida Station (13 min)
Walk or taxi back to Kawaguchiko Station (~5 min), then board train.
3:45–5:30
⛩️ Chureito Pagoda — Golden Hour!
398 steps up. Plenty of time for the "Fuji + Pagoda + Cherry Blossoms" shot. Golden hour light on Fuji is magical at this time!
~5:45 PM
Train back to Kawaguchiko Station
7:00 PM
Dinner — Taj Fuji (Indian veg)
4.8★. Paneer Butter Masala, Dal Makhani, Veggie Biryani.
~8:30 PM
Return to Hotel Asafuji + Onsen
Onsen typically open until 22:00–23:00. Well earned!
🎫
3-Day Fuji-Hakone Pass covers every leg of today's circuit. Saves ~¥3,000–4,000.
🚕
Book sunrise taxi at check-in (~3 PM)! Ask front desk: "Please book a taxi for 5:15 AM tomorrow to Oishi Park."
modals.m6:
Day 6 — Sunrise + Volcanic Loop
5:15 AM
Pre-booked taxi → Oishi Park (~10 min)
Sunrise 5:32 AM. "Mirror Fuji" reflection across Lake Kawaguchi. Before crowds and morning haze!
7:30 AM
Breakfast at hotel + Check out
8:10 AM
Bus from hotel → Kawaguchiko Station
8:30 AM
Fujikyu Bus → Gotemba Station
10:00 AM
Odakyu Highway Bus → Togendai
10:45–1:30
Volcanic Loop: Ropeway + Owakudani
Ropeway Togendai→Owakudani (sulfur vents, Kuro-tamago black eggs!) → Sounzan → Cable Car → Gora. Allow full 2h45.
1:45 PM
Quick soba at Gora + board Tozan Railway immediately
Switchback zig-zag mountain train — reverses 3 times! (~40 min to Hakone-Yumoto)
2:45 PM
Arrive Hakone-Yumoto · Retrieve suitcases
3:15 PM
Local train → Odawara (20 min) · Arrives 3:35 PM
3:35–6:00
🏯 Bonus: Odawara Castle or Minaka Odawara
Castle grounds free, 10-min walk. OR Minaka Odawara complex has a free rooftop footbath with city views!
6:07 PM
Hikari 653 → Nagoya (Car 9, 9-C/D) · Reservn #2003
7:14 PM
Arrive Nagoya · Check in Marriott
modals.m7:
Day 7 — Ghibli Park + Kyoto
Morning
Ghibli Park (1-Day Bus Tour from Nagoya)
Subway Higashiyama Line → Fujigaoka, then Linimo (Maglev) → Ai-Chikyuhaku-Kinen-Koen Station (~35 min). Conf: 1748454029 · Ref: 1365566583
~5:00 PM
Return to Nagoya Station
Confirm Viator tour return time. Next Hikari after 721 is 19:42 if needed.
7:03 PM
Hikari 721 → Kyoto (Car 8, 8-C/D) · Reservn #2004
7:37 PM
Arrive Kyoto · Check in Hilton Garden Inn
Luggage already here from Tokyo shipment!
modals.m8:
Day 8 — Kyoto Paths & Parks
Morning
Philosopher's Path
1.8km canal path lined with cherry trees. Start from Ginkaku-ji (Silver Pavilion) end, walk south. Best in early morning before crowds.
Midday
Heian Shrine + Gardens
Cherry blossoms reflected over the strolling garden pond.
Afternoon
Maruyama Park
Giant weeping Shidarezakura. Paper lanterns at dusk — magical night atmosphere.
Evening
Gion District Night Walk
Hanamikoji Street. Best chance to spot geiko/maiko after 6 PM.
🗺️
→ Google Maps: Kyoto Route
🍱
Try Shojin Ryori for lunch near Philosopher's Path. Reserve in advance.
modals.m9:
Day 9 — Kimono + Temples + Arashiyama
8:00 AM
Kimono Rental — Gion (Higashiyama)
Rental Kimono Okamoto Gion
523 Washiocho, Higashiyama Ward
📞 +81 75-531-7890. Go EARLY for empty streets!
~9:00 AM
Photo route in kimono: Yasaka Shrine → return kimono
Yasaka Shrine → Hanamikoji → Ninenzaka/Sannenzaka → Kiyomizu-dera. All walkable from Gion rental shop!
Midday
Fushimi Inari
JR Nara Line → Inari Station (5 min from Kyoto). Thousands of orange torii gates. Walk at least 30 min up.
Afternoon
Arashiyama Bamboo Grove + Tenryu-ji
~45–60 min transit from Fushimi Inari. Cherry blossoms over Tenryu-ji pond.
Evening
Gion District
🧳 SHIP LUGGAGE THIS MORNING
Drop at Hilton Garden Inn Kyoto bell desk before heading out. To: Hilton Osaka. Check-in: April 6.
📸
Add hair styling at kimono shop — huge difference in photos. Gion photography restrictions — respect local signs.
modals.m10:
Day 10 — Hiroshima + Miyajima
07:45
Be at Kyoto Station (Nozomi 99 departs 08:03)
Quick breakfast at hotel or convenience store. Luggage already shipped to Osaka.
9:39 AM
Arrive Hiroshima Station
Buy Hiroshima Tourist Pass immediately at Tourist Info 1F (opens 09:30 ✅). ¥1,000.
~10:00
Check in Hilton Hiroshima (drop bags)
10:30 AM
Hiroshima Peace Memorial Museum
Allow 2+ hours minimum. One of the world's most important museums. Children's Peace Monument + A-Bomb Dome right outside.
~1:00 PM
Lunch — Okonomimura
Hiroshima-style okonomiyaki — ask for vegetarian version. Multi-floor building of stalls near station.
~2:30 PM
JR Sanyo Line → Miyajimaguchi (~25 min)
~3:10 PM
Ferry → Miyajima Island (10 min)
Sacred deer everywhere! Check tide times — high tide = floating Torii gate.
~3:20 PM
Itsukushima Shrine + Floating Torii
Cherry blossoms on the island. Momijidani Park. Try momiji manju.
~5:30 PM
Return ferry + JR back to Hiroshima
🌊
Check Miyajima tide table before going — high tide gives the iconic floating gate effect. Tide times change daily.
modals.m11:
Day 11 — Full Day Osaka
9:07 AM
Nozomi 10 from Hiroshima → Shin-Osaka
Car 8, Seat 11-A/B. Reservn #2008. Arrives 10:28.
10:28 AM
Arrive Shin-Osaka → JR → Osaka Station
~11:00
Check in Hilton Osaka (Umeda)
Luggage already here from Kyoto shipment! Full day ahead ✅
~11:30 AM
Osaka Castle + Nishinomaru Garden
Cherry trees throughout the castle grounds. Nishinomaru Garden is the peak blossom spot inside. ~2 hrs.
~2:00 PM
Kuromon Ichiba Market
Osaka's kitchen. Fresh tofu, veggie options, street food.
~3:30 PM
Shinsaibashi Shopping arcade
Covered 600m arcade — fashion, cosmetics, souvenirs.
~6:00 PM
Dotonbori Evening
Neon lights, Glico Man sign, takoyaki, Osaka vibe!
~7:30 PM
Dinner — Pivot BASE Café & Bar or GYOZAOH! Dotonbori
modals.m12:
Day 12 — Departure
9:00 AM
Leave hotel for Osaka airport
Allow sufficient time for check-in, security, and boarding.
12:40 PM
✈️ Depart Osaka → Tokyo Haneda
Arrives 1:55 PM at Haneda
1:55 PM
Arrive Haneda — transfer to international terminal
Tokyo Monorail connects terminals. Allow 40–50 min. Go directly — NO time for shopping!
4:20 PM
✈️ Depart Tokyo Haneda → SFO
Arrives SFO 9:45 AM same day 🎉
⏰
Only 2h25 min between landing (1:55 PM) and SFO departure (4:20 PM). Go directly to international check-in. No detours.
